name: python3-git
title: python3-git
summary: Python library to interact with Git repositories
description:
Python library to interact with Git repositories
The GitPython project provides object model access to a Git repository, so
Python can be used to manipulate it. Repository objects can be opened or
created, which can then be traversed to find parent commit(s), trees, blobs,
etc.
.
This package provides the Python 3.x module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-git because Python library to interact with Git repositories.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-git as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-git with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-git --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
